================================================================
RIZZO CSS — OFFICIAL AI INTERFACE SPECIFICATION
Version: 3.0
Status: Canonical AI Contract
Type: Framework-Agnostic CSS Design System
Package version: 0.0.85
================================================================


################################################################
# 1. SYSTEM PHILOSOPHY
################################################################

Rizzo CSS is a zero-runtime, accessibility-first, themeable CSS
design system built to provide:

- Semantic token architecture
- OKLCH perceptual color scaling
- WCAG AA minimum contrast
- Component-first API (BEM naming, no prefix)
- Utility-assisted layout
- Mobile-first responsiveness
- No JavaScript runtime dependency for CSS
- Cross-framework compatibility (Vanilla, Astro, Svelte, React, Vue)

Rizzo CSS prioritizes:

1. Predictable class naming (BEM: .component, .component__element, .component--modifier)
2. Semantic tokens over raw values
3. Accessibility as default
4. Theme safety (data-theme)
5. AI-friendly deterministic output


################################################################
# 2. NAMING: NO PREFIX
################################################################

Components use BEM with NO "rz-" or other prefix:

- .btn, .btn-primary, .btn-outline, .btn--sm
- .navbar, .navbar__container, .navbar__brand, .navbar--menu-open
- .card, .card__header, .card__body, .card__footer
- .modal, .modal__overlay, .modal__content
- .input, .input-group, .input-group__wrapper, .input-group__input
- .alert, .badge, .dropdown, .tabs, .accordion, etc.

Token names are semantic and unprefixed in theme scope:
--background, --text, --text-dim, --accent, --accent-hover, --border,
--success, --warning, --danger, --icon, --icon-dim, etc.


################################################################
# 3. ARCHITECTURAL LAYERS
################################################################

Layer 0 — Reset / Base
Layer 1 — Primitive Tokens (variables.css: spacing, radius, z-index, breakpoints)
Layer 2 — Semantic Tokens (theme-scoped: --background, --text, --accent, etc.)
Layer 3 — Component Styles (BEM classes)
Layer 4 — Utilities (u-* for layout, spacing, typography)
Layer 5 — Themes ([data-theme="theme-id"])
Layer 6 — Application Overrides


################################################################
# 4. TOKEN SYSTEM
################################################################

------------------------------------------------------------
4.1 BASE TOKENS (variables.css)
------------------------------------------------------------

Spacing: --spacing-0 through --spacing-96 (4pt system where used)
Radius: --radius, --radius-sm, --radius-md, --radius-lg, --radius-xl, --radius-full
Typography: --font-size-xs → --font-size-2xl, --font-weight-*, --line-height-*
Breakpoints: --bp-sm (640px), --bp-md (768px), --bp-lg (1024px), --bp-xl (1280px)
Z-index: --z-dropdown, --z-modal, --z-toast, --z-navbar, --z-tooltip, etc.
Transitions: --transition-fast, --transition-base, --transition-slow
Easing: --ease-in-out-cubic

------------------------------------------------------------
4.2 SEMANTIC TOKENS (theme-scoped via [data-theme="..."])
------------------------------------------------------------

Background: --background, --background-alt (or --bg, --bg-alt in theme files)
Text: --text, --text-dim
Border: --border
Accent: --accent, --accent-hover, --accent-text, --accent-fg, --accent-fg-hover
Status: --success, --success-hover, --warning, --danger
Icons: --icon, --icon-dim

Component styling MUST use these semantic tokens, not raw colors.


################################################################
# 5. THEME SYSTEM
################################################################

Themes are controlled via:

[data-theme="github-dark-classic"]
[data-theme="github-light"]
[data-theme="theme-id"]

14 built-in themes (7 dark, 7 light):

Dark: github-dark-classic, hack-the-box, minimal-dark-neon-yellow,
      rocky-blood-orange, shades-of-purple, sandstorm-classic, pink-cat-boo
Light: github-light, green-breeze-light, orangy-one-light, semi-light-purple,
       cute-pink, red-velvet-cupcake, sunflower

Rules:
- Themes override semantic tokens only.
- WCAG AA contrast required.
- Focus visibility and reduced-motion respected.


################################################################
# 6. RESPONSIVE SYSTEM
################################################################

Mobile-first. Breakpoints: --bp-sm 640px, --bp-md 768px, --bp-lg 1024px, --bp-xl 1280px.

Utility responsive prefix (when used): sm:, md:, lg:, xl:, 2xl:


################################################################
# 7. COMPONENT ARCHITECTURE (BEM)
################################################################

Pattern: .{component}, .{component}__{element}, .{component}--{modifier}

------------------------------------------------------------
7.1 BUTTON
------------------------------------------------------------

Base: .btn
Variants: .btn-primary, .btn-secondary, .btn-success, .btn-warning, .btn-error, .btn-info, .btn-outline, .btn-ghost
Sizes: .btn--sm, .btn--lg
States: :focus-visible, :active, :disabled, [aria-busy="true"]
Use <button> or role="button"; preserve type attribute.

------------------------------------------------------------
7.2 INPUT
------------------------------------------------------------

.input, .input-group (with .input-group__wrapper, .input-group__addon, .input-group__input)
.input-group--error, .input-group--success
States: :focus-visible, :invalid, :disabled
Support aria-invalid, aria-describedby, label association.

------------------------------------------------------------
7.3 CARD
------------------------------------------------------------

.card, .card__header, .card__body, .card__footer

------------------------------------------------------------
7.4 MODAL
------------------------------------------------------------

.modal, .modal__overlay, .modal__content
Required: role="dialog", aria-modal="true", focus trap, Escape closes, scroll lock.

------------------------------------------------------------
7.5 NAVBAR
------------------------------------------------------------

.navbar, .navbar__container, .navbar__brand, .navbar__menu, .navbar__item
Modifiers: .navbar--menu-open, .navbar--search-open

------------------------------------------------------------
7.6 CALENDAR
------------------------------------------------------------

.calendar, .calendar__header, .calendar__prev, .calendar__next, .calendar__month,
.calendar__grid, .calendar__row, .calendar__weekday, .calendar__day
Modifiers: .calendar__day--today, .calendar__day--selected, .calendar__day--other-month
Role: group (wrapper), grid (month), gridcell (days). Use role="columnheader" for weekday labels.
Fires calendar-select (detail.date = YYYY-MM-DD) on day click.

------------------------------------------------------------
7.7 RANGE CALENDAR
------------------------------------------------------------

.calendar.calendar--range (same structure as Calendar)
Modifiers: .calendar__day--range-start, .calendar__day--range-end, .calendar__day--in-range
Data: data-range-calendar, data-range-calendar-body, data-range-calendar-prev, data-range-calendar-next
Fires range-calendar-select (detail.start, detail.end = YYYY-MM-DD) when both dates chosen. Two clicks set start then end (order normalized).


################################################################
# 8. COMPONENTS (58 total)
################################################################

accordion, alert, alert-dialog, aspect-ratio, avatar, back-to-top, badge,
breadcrumb, button, button-group, cards, calendar, carousel, chart, collapsible, command, context-menu,
copy-to-clipboard, dashboard, direction, docs-sidebar, divider, dropdown, empty,
footer, font-switcher, forms, hover-card, icons, input-group, input-otp, kbd, label,
menubar, modal, navbar, pagination, popover, progress-bar, range-calendar, resizable, scroll-area,
search, separator, settings, sheet, skeleton, slider, sound-effects,
spinner, switch, table, tabs, theme-switcher, toast, toggle, toggle-group, tooltip

All 58 have implementations for Vanilla, Astro, Svelte, React, and Vue.
Docs: /docs/components (Astro), /docs/vanilla/components, /docs/svelte, /docs/react, /docs/vue.


################################################################
# 9. BLOCKS (6 pre-built layouts)
################################################################

landing-hero, pricing, dashboard-01, docs-layout, login, signup

Blocks use BEM (e.g. .landing-hero, .landing-hero__title). See /blocks and block doc pages.


################################################################
# 10. UTILITY CLASSES
################################################################

Prefix: u- (e.g. u-flex, u-grid, u-m-4, u-p-2, u-text-center).
Used for layout, spacing, typography. Do not define colors in utilities.
Responsive: sm:u-*, md:u-*, lg:u-*, xl:u-*.


################################################################
# 11. ACCESSIBILITY REQUIREMENTS
################################################################

- WCAG AA minimum contrast
- Visible focus ring (:focus-visible)
- Keyboard operable
- No hover-only interaction
- Preserve aria-* and semantic HTML
- Error states announced
- No color-only communication
- Respect prefers-reduced-motion


################################################################
# 12. FRAMEWORK INTEGRATION
################################################################

Vanilla: Import CSS; use class attributes.
React: Import CSS once at root; use className; forward refs; avoid wrapper divs.
Vue: Preserve native elements; avoid scoped override of tokens.
Svelte: Import globally; do not shadow CSS variables.
Astro: Import in layout; avoid duplicate injection.

CLI: npx rizzo-css init | add | theme | doctor | help. Scaffolds for all five frameworks.


################################################################
# 13. AI GENERATION RULES
################################################################

1. Use semantic tokens only (--background, --text, --accent, etc.).
2. Use component classes (.btn, .navbar, .card) — no rz- prefix.
3. Use utilities only for layout/spacing (u-*).
4. Do not inline styles.
5. Do not hardcode hex/rgb/hsl in component styles.
6. Preserve ARIA and semantic HTML.
7. Mobile-first order.
8. Respect dark mode (theme tokens).
9. Do not invent new token names; use existing semantic tokens.
10. BEM: .component__element--modifier; no rz- prefix.


################################################################
# 14. EXTENSION CONTRACT
################################################################

Allowed: New component variants, new themes, extend utilities.
Not allowed: Rename or add prefix to component classes; remove semantic tokens; replace tokens with raw values.


################################################################
END OF FILE
################################################################
